response.overview: One case. No answers.  A gripping true crime, uncovering a case that was never solved. This dark file, dives into the story of James showcasing the unanswered mystery and the chilling event taken place on Tuesday 14th of November as he relives the events, facing the trauma, realising he wasn’t the only victim as the chief of police seeks some truths that are buried.
response.tagline: The criminal still has not been caught… So this still remains… A DARK FILE
response.title: The Dark Files
